import functools

@functools.lru_cache(maxsize=128)
def get_schema(table_name):
    return _fetch_schema_from_db(table_name)

@functools.lru_cache(maxsize=64)
def compute_hash(data_block):
    return hashlib.sha256(data_block.encode()).hexdigest()

@functools.lru_cache(maxsize=32)
def get_user_permissions(user_id):
    return _query_permissions(user_id)

class DataProcessor:
    def __init__(self, config):
        self.config = config
        self._results = []

    def process(self, table_name, user_id):
        schema = get_schema(table_name)
        permissions = get_user_permissions(user_id)
        return {"schema": schema, "permissions": permissions}
